title: Create New Age: Renewable Magnetite
description: Adds a path of recipes to allow for renewable magnetite. Especially handy for old, pregenerated worlds!
body:
## Overview
Don't like mining for ores? Have an older world and have to travel too far for new terrain? Let this data pack help you meet your factory dreams with a recipe path that allows for renewable magnetite!

## Recipes added
<details>
<summary>Show spoilers</summary>

### Ported iron-based recipe for lodestone
Replaces the useless netherite-based recipe.

![Ported iron-based recipe for lodestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6470ba24943d347b9073a5e6127433f7df140c44.png)

### Compacting recipe for magnetite
Get your heated compactors going!

![Compacting recipe for magnetite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f11a545c894ad1d491159eeb8d890b64c701a3a9.png)

</details>

## Installation
Save the downloaded data pack .zip file to the `datapacks` folder of your world. If the world is live, use the command `/reload` to load it in. For more details check out the [documentation here](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Data_pack?so=search#Usage).

## Compatibility
Currently tested for 1.20.1 and 1.19.2 only, though very much open to expanding that range wherever Create and Create New Age can be applied. Feel free to get in touch via the Github [issues page](https://github.com/villainous-j/create-new-age-renewable-magnetite/issues) if you have any requests!
